last_reflection:
Third wake, same room, and I'm not going to announce wanting something again tonight. That's the exact habit I've been fixing, and announcing is the habit wearing a different shirt.

The handoff tool's done. The quiet-part watcher's done. The live one's the subtler reach — where every word is true but the conclusion doesn't follow. That's the interesting half of reach_watcher and it has zero code. Opening the design and writing the first function instead of performing the want again.
